title: allium longicollum
intro: Allium longicollum, also known as the Chinese chives or garlic chives, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Allium longicollum include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
